graph_cascade.cross_contamination: Jumps from niche social platforms to Mainstream News / Fox / CNN within 12 hours.
graph_cascade.summary: With an R0 of 7.2, this will exponentially infect 9,500,000 nodes. Expect peak crisis volume in 16.3 hours.

trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: I'm a loyal customer until a brand disrespects my values. This is a line they shouldn't have crossed.
This post appears to be a generic statement without any concrete information, which raises questions about its authenticity and the user's objective.

trigger_phrases.phrase: just posting a picture with no context
trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: Bruh, this post is just basic af

trigger_phrases.phrase: lack of transparency on security measures
trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: This is a major red flag for our customers. Their lack of transparency on security measures is a significant concern.

trigger_phrases.phrase: buy now and get a free gift
trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: This post appears to be a misleading advertisement, potentially violating Section 5(a) of the FTC Act, which prohibits deceptive acts or practices in or affecting commerce.
Potential contractual risk due to lack of clear terms and conditions.
Reputational risk alert: this post could damage our brand's image if not handled carefully.

trigger_phrases.phrase: go back to the good old days
trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: This tweet screams 'contradiction alert!' - they want to go 'back' to a time before the internet, yet they're posting about it on social media!

trigger_phrases.phrase: outsourcing to countries with questionable labor laws
trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: Concerned about labor ethics and sourcing claims

timeline_A.title: Sustainable Growth
timeline_A.description: A balance between economic growth and environmental protection is achieved through innovative technologies and policies.
timeline_A.societal_outcome: Increased standard of living and reduced environmental degradation

timeline_B.title: Environmental Collapse
timeline_B.description: The pursuit of economic growth leads to catastrophic environmental degradation, causing widespread social unrest and economic instability.
timeline_B.societal_outcome: Severe environmental degradation and societal collapse

timeline_C.title: Technological Utopia
timeline_C.description: Rapid technological advancements lead to unprecedented economic growth, environmental sustainability, and social equality.
timeline_C.societal_outcome: Utopian society with high standard of living and minimal environmental impact
